decisions.rationale: The observation resolves to base_record_id 'project_125th-st-sbs-2013' which already exists in the registry with identical payload: project_name '125th Street Select Bus Service', project_type 'Select Bus Service', status 'Proposed', borough 'Manhattan', and matching description about offset bus lanes from Morningside Avenue to Second Avenue. The source_id '2013_04_09_sbs_125th_workshop_3' is already listed in the registry record's source_ids. Per rules, when the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is 'new' — the observation already resolves to the correct canonical record.
